## What this changes

## Checklist
- [ ] Check and source IDs untouched (never renumbered, recycled or reordered; insertions use dotted suffixes like `O-18.1`)
- [ ] Legal claims cite a catalogued source (`[S..]`, `[N..]`, `[G..]`, `[E..]`, `[J..]`)
- [ ] If checklist items changed: the mirrored requirement in `requirements/` is aligned (same IDs)
- [ ] CHANGELOG.md updated with per-ID entries (Added / Changed / Deprecated / Sources)
